sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 12.97 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.12)

statement.latex: Let${ F}$be the formation of all finite groups all of whose composition factors are isomorphic to some fixed simple non-abelian group$T$. Prove that${ F}$is indecomposable into a product of two non-trivial subformations. { L.\,A.\,Shemetkov} It is proved (O.\,V.\,Mel'nikov, Problems in Algebra, { 9}, Gomel', 1996, 42--47 (Russian)).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
